Container.Name: BudgetDashboard
Container.Overview: Personal finance dashboard synced with Firefly III. Shows net worth, budgets, spending trends, and an AI assistant. Requires a Postgres 16 container.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL 16 connection string. Point this at your Postgres container (use its IP or container name on a custom Docker network).

Config.Name: FIREFLY_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Firefly III instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8080

Config.Name: FIREFLY_TOKEN
Config.Description: Firefly III Personal Access Token (Profile → OAuth → Personal Access Tokens).

Config.Name: JWT_SECRET
Config.Description: Long random string used to sign session tokens. Generate one at: https://generate-secret.vercel.app/64

Config.Name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Config.Description: Anthropic API key for the AI assistant. Optional — you can also configure a local Ollama model in the app settings after first login.

Config.Name: CLAUDE_MODEL
Config.Description: Claude model to use (only applies when using Anthropic).
